text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few weeks after the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo summons me to meet her at the
racecourse.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's been a while since we've been here.
choice_data_list: It's only been a few weeks...
It's only been a few weeks...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No! That's not what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
About a year ago, we came here for a particular
purpose, remember?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There you are, Trainer. Are you prepared yet?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're about to go on a journey worthy of a king,
one which ends in becoming first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I said those words a year ago, right before I set
off on a path completely of my own making.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Not a path to gain everyone's approval, but a
path for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I've continued down it as a first-rate
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But still... recently, something has been bothering
me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ever since she stepped out, the crowd has been
going wild! A fitting show of enthusiasm for this
year's champion of the Classics!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Isn't everyone a little too excited?
choice_data_list:
They were just as excited when it was you out
there.

They were just as excited when it was you out
there.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Don't say that! That just makes it worse!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who won the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, the Sprinters Stakes, and the autumn Tenno Sho this year.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm this year's star! I'm the one at the center of people's attention! I should be the one being praised and worshiped by everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, in short...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No! Not more, I want it always!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm King Halo, the first-rate Umamusume! The
only one playing the leading role in my world
should be me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For as long as I continue on this path, the
spotlight should be on me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have no intention on giving it up, not even to
those who come after me!
choice_data_list: In that case, we need to go out and win more!
In that case, we need to go out and win more!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's show everyone my first-rate—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Grrrr! You dummies! Don't interrupt me with your
cheers!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... I don't care who these new racers are! I'll
beat them all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: To start, I'll win the Arima Kinen, and then—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume from the Race
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I wonder who will be the Umamusume of the
Year.

text_block_list.name: Excited Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, me too! I also want to know who'll be this
year's Decorated Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I just had a great idea. If I'm not mistaken...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Did you hear?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My mother announced her interest in designing
signature racewear for future URA Decorated
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But for me, something like that is nothing more
than a checkpoint down the path I walk.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have what it takes to receive that title because
I'm a first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a title given to Umamusume who have
contributed most to the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's counted among the greatest honors an
Umamusume can receive.
choice_data_list:
Think you can keep it up till the end of your
career?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The end of my career?! Why would you say
something so stupid?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to remain active my entire life! Don't be
a simpleton!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like King Halo has no intention of ever
retiring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, she has a lifetime ahead of her
before she earns that title.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should run in the Arima Kinen after all.
Hmm... If I do, then...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'd basically have to come up from the bottom! In
fact, I think "King Halo Makes the Impossible
Possible" would be a perfect headline!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! If we're going to do this, I'll need to start
practicing my dash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, she really should focus on her upcoming
races first, rather than those in the distant future.
